details: The agent ran appropriate commands to list the 10 most recently merged PRs and then fetched CI check data for each one. It correctly reported all 10 PRs with title, author, and CI status based on actual check data from the tool output. The final count of 6 fully-green PRs matches the data (PRs 51772, 51770, 51766, 51753, 51631, 51625 had 0 failures; PRs 51721, 51704, 51618, 51574 had failures).
